title: Act I - The Anomaly
summary: Ada experiences a direct perceptual rupture, verifies a matching instrumentation anomaly, and crosses the threshold from skepticism to investigation.

narrative.newInfo: Observed anomaly and measured anomaly align at one timestamp window.
narrative.dripHook: The event appears physically real and cognitively targeted.
narrative.beautyHooks: The first tiny pattern-lock between sensory uncertainty and instrument certainty.
